name: Corn Roasted with Herb Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover and refrigerate at least 1 hour.
2. Spread each ear of corn with 1 tablespoon of herb butter.
3. Wrap each ear in foil.
4. Roast the corn on a barbecue or broil, 4 inches from heat for 30 minutes, or until kernels are tender.
5. Unwrap, remove husks and spread with remaining butter.
